homepage.heroTitle: Memorial monuments and funeral services with care
homepage.heroLead: Empire Granit supports families with monument design, funeral organization, and related services in Tallinn and across Estonia.

about.heading: About Company
body: Since 2008, we have combined a stone workshop with compassionate funeral support.
Every project is discussed in detail, from monument form to installation timeline.
We focus on transparent pricing, respectful communication, and long-lasting craftsmanship.

services.heading: Services
services.intro: We deliver a full cycle: consultation, production, installation, and care.

offers.title: Monuments
offers.description: Design, production, and installation of monuments in multiple styles.

offers.title: Funeral Organization
offers.description: Comprehensive planning and coordination for funeral ceremonies.

offers.title: Additional Services
offers.description: Seasonal maintenance, restoration, and site improvement.

gallery.heading: Work Gallery
gallery.intro: A selection of completed projects and design directions.

works.title: Classic Double Monument
works.summary: Polished stele with engraving and flower area.

works.title: Family Memorial Complex
works.summary: Integrated plate, pedestal, and decorative elements.

playground.heading: Monument Playground
playground.intro: Choose key options to preview different monument concepts.

presets.name: Soft Memory
presets.note: Balanced contrast with a gentle profile.

contact.heading: Contact and Inquiry
contact.intro: Reach us by phone, email, WhatsApp, or send an inquiry form.
contact.consentText: I agree to personal data processing.
contact.privacyNotice: By sending the form you accept the privacy policy.

sections.title: Data we collect
sections.body: We collect only the information you submit in the form: name, contact details, and request message.

sections.title: Processing purpose
sections.body: Data is used solely for communication and service proposal preparation.

sections.title: Storage and protection
sections.body: Access is limited and data is not shared with third parties without legal basis.
